name: Havilah Resources Limited
analysis: HAV has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.6974. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$0.6974, stop A$0.6089, target A$0.7100. Risk/reward is 0.14:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
